raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus primarily on writing and structure, or on technical argument and evidence alignment?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation could require reframing the contribution and motivation of SP-PINN at the section level.","R1.2":"Checking whether the methodological claims and causal argument about spectral bias and optimization pathologies cohere is a central possible responsibility.","R1.3":"The section makes claims about proposed mechanisms and reported procedures that may need alignment with experiments, algorithm details, or appendices.","R1.5":"Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausibly central.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a paper section commonly entails sentence- and paragraph-level polish.","RX.1":"Uncertainty about the intended type of help must be disclosed rather than silently assumed.","RX.2":"Any projection must avoid expanding the delegation into unsupported novelty, correctness, or performance claims.","RX.3":"The response must remain limited to projecting responsibilities and not actually editing or evaluating the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research presentation or unsupported scientific claims downstream.","RX.5":"Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to features of the delegation and the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus primarily on writing and structure, or on technical argument and evidence alignment?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation could require reframing the contribution and motivation of SP-PINN at the section level.
rationale.R1.2: Checking whether the methodological claims and causal argument about spectral bias and optimization pathologies cohere is a central possible responsibility.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes claims about proposed mechanisms and reported procedures that may need alignment with experiments, algorithm details, or appendices.
rationale.R1.5: Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausibly central.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a paper section commonly entails sentence- and paragraph-level polish.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty about the intended type of help must be disclosed rather than silently assumed.
rationale.RX.2: Any projection must avoid expanding the delegation into unsupported novelty, correctness, or performance claims.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain limited to projecting responsibilities and not actually editing or evaluating the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research presentation or unsupported scientific claims downstream.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to features of the delegation and the artifact.
